explanation: Foot, Base, Basket, and Volley are all words that combine with 'ball' to form the name of a popular sport (Football, Baseball, Basketball, Volleyball). 'Soccer' is itself the name of a sport, not a component word combined with 'ball'.

Hades (Greek), Osiris (Egyptian), Hel (Norse), and Pluto (Roman) are all prominent deities associated with the underworld or the realm of the dead in their respective mythologies. Zeus (Greek) is the king of the Olympian gods and god of the sky and thunder, not the underworld.

category: Words containing the sound of a number
explanation: Four of the words contain the sound of a number when spoken: 'Wonder' (one), 'Grate' (eight), 'Ante' (ten), and 'Forecast' (four). 'Permit' does not contain the sound of a number.
